neqsim.process.safety.overpressure
 

  • Uses of BlockedOutletRelief in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure that return BlockedOutletRelief
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BlockedOutletRelief
    BlockedOutletRelief.setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
    Sets the inflow fluid used to evaluate the relieving-phase properties.
    BlockedOutletRelief
    BlockedOutletRelief.setInflowRateKgPerHr(double inflowRateKgPerHr)
    Sets the maximum credible inflow rate to the protected item in kg/hr.
    BlockedOutletRelief
    BlockedOutletRelief.setInflowRateKgPerS(double inflowRateKgPerS)
    Sets the maximum credible inflow rate to the protected item.
    BlockedOutletRelief
    BlockedOutletRelief.setName(String name)
    Sets the scenario name.
    BlockedOutletRelief
    BlockedOutletRelief.setReliefPressureBara(double reliefPressureBara)
    Sets the relieving pressure at which fluid properties are evaluated.
    BlockedOutletRelief
    BlockedOutletRelief.setReliefTemperatureC(double reliefTemperatureC)
    Sets the relieving temperature at which fluid properties are evaluated.
